text:
## Technology Vision  
**Strategic Direction:**
- Microservices-based, event-driven architecture
- API-first integration model
- Cloud-ready infrastructure (hybrid cloud)
- Real-time data processing and analytics
- Security-first design (zero-trust)
- Open Banking compliance (PSD2, Open Banking Standard)  
**Regulatory Alignment:**
- FCA COBS (Conduct of Business)
- PRA Rulebook (capital, liquidity)
- GDPR (data protection)
- Open Banking regulations  
---
name: Chunk 3/39

raw_entities.name: Financial Conduct Authority
raw_entities.description: The UK financial regulator responsible for setting and enforcing conduct rules that govern how FirstUK Bank must operate its business activities.

raw_entities.name: Prudential Regulation Authority
raw_entities.description: The UK regulatory body overseeing prudential standards, including capital adequacy and liquidity requirements for FirstUK Bank.

raw_entities.name: Microservices Event-Driven Architecture
raw_entities.description: The foundational technical architecture guiding FirstUK Bank's system design, emphasizing decoupled services and asynchronous event communication.

raw_entities.name: API-First Integration Model
raw_entities.description: The strategic approach to system connectivity where APIs are designed as the primary interface for all internal and external integrations.

raw_entities.name: Hybrid Cloud Infrastructure
raw_entities.description: The target deployment environment for FirstUK Bank's technology stack, combining on-premises and public cloud resources to ensure scalability and resilience.

raw_entities.name: Real-Time Data Processing & Analytics Platform
raw_entities.description: The capability to ingest, process, and analyze banking data instantaneously to support immediate decision-making and operational visibility.

raw_entities.name: Zero-Trust Security Architecture
raw_entities.description: A security framework requiring strict identity verification for every person and device trying to access resources on FirstUK Bank's network, regardless of location.

raw_entities.name: Open Banking Compliance Framework
raw_entities.description: The mandatory operational requirement for FirstUK Bank to adhere to open banking standards, enabling secure data sharing with third-party providers.
context: Open Banking compliance (PSD2, Open Banking Standard)

raw_entities.name: Payment Services Directive 2
raw_entities.description: The EU/UK regulatory directive governing payment services and enforcing open banking data access requirements for FirstUK Bank.
context: Open Banking compliance (PSD2, Open Banking Standard)

raw_entities.name: Open Banking Standard
raw_entities.description: The technical and operational specification defining how FirstUK Bank must expose customer data via APIs to authorized third parties.
context: Open Banking compliance (PSD2, Open Banking Standard)

raw_entities.name: FCA Conduct of Business Sourcebook
raw_entities.description: The specific set of rules issued by the FCA that dictate how FirstUK Bank must conduct its business activities and interact with customers.

raw_entities.name: PRA Supervisory Statement & Rulebook
raw_entities.description: The regulatory framework establishing capital and liquidity thresholds that FirstUK Bank must maintain to ensure financial stability.

raw_entities.name: General Data Protection Regulation
raw_entities.description: The data protection law mandating how FirstUK Bank must collect, store, process, and secure customer and operational data.

raw_entities.name: Open Banking Regulatory Framework
raw_entities.description: The overarching legal and regulatory requirements governing data sharing, API standards, and consumer consent mechanisms for FirstUK Bank.
